'''lathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hickup|hickup]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-th-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hickup|hickup]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lathaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læthækæth|læthækæth]] || [[word:læthækæj|læthækæj]] || [[word:læthækæsh|læthækæsh]] || [[word:læthækæ|læthækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lathathakath|lathathakath]] || [[word:lathathakaj|lathathakaj]] || [[word:lathathakash|lathathakash]] || [[word:lathathaka|lathathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lathakath|lathakath]] || [[word:lathakaj|lathakaj]] || [[word:lathakash|lathakash]] || [[word:lathaka|lathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lathafkath|lathafkath]] || [[word:lathafkaj|lathafkaj]] || [[word:lathafkash|lathafkash]] || [[word:lathafkaf|lathafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lathakatha|lathakatha]] || [[word:lathakaja|lathakaja]] || [[word:lathakasha|lathakasha]] || [[word:lathakaka|lathakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lathakath|lathakath]] || [[word:lathakaj|lathakaj]] || [[word:lathakash|lathakash]] || [[word:lathaka|lathaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lathakathal|lathakathal]] || [[word:lathakajal|lathakajal]] || [[word:lathakashal|lathakashal]] || [[word:lathakakal|lathakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lathakathatha|lathakathatha]] || [[word:lathakajaja|lathakajaja]] || [[word:lathakashasha|lathakashasha]] || [[word:lathakaka|lathakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lathakathan|lathakathan]] || [[word:lathakajan|lathakajan]] || [[word:lathakashan|lathakashan]] || [[word:lathakakan|lathakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lathakathaoro|lathakathaoro]] || [[word:lathakajaoro|lathakajaoro]] || [[word:lathakashaoro|lathakashaoro]] || [[word:lathakakaoro|lathakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
